name: devutils-sdks
description: Production-grade SDKs for DevUtils API - Screenshot, PDF, Reader, and more
author: DevUtils

scripts.build:all: npm --prefix sdk-js run build && npm --prefix cdn run build && python -m build sdk-python 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python SDK build skipped'
scripts.build:python: python -m build sdk-python 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python SDK build skipped'
scripts.test:all: npm --prefix sdk-js run test && npm --prefix cdn run test && python -m pytest sdk-python/tests 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python tests skipped'
scripts.test:python: python -m pytest sdk-python/tests 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python tests skipped'
scripts.lint: npm --prefix sdk-js run lint && npm --prefix cdn run lint
scripts.format: npm --prefix sdk-js run format && npm --prefix cdn run format
